machine_learning: Machine learning is a field of AI that allows computers to learn patterns from data without being explicitly programmed.
supervised_learning: Supervised learning is a type of machine learning where the model learns from labeled data.
unsupervised_learning: Unsupervised learning finds hidden patterns in data without labeled outputs.
overfitting: Overfitting happens when a model learns the training data too well including noise, causing poor performance on new data.
feature_engineering: Feature engineering is the process of creating new input features from existing data to improve model performance.
